name: Canadian Phone Number
description: Detects Canadian phone numbers (NANP +1 country code). Bare unlabeled numbers require +1 prefix, parenthesized area code, or dash/dot separators to reduce false positives against healthcare IDs and other 10-digit sequences.

metadata.pattern_rationale: Four arms: (1) phone keyword label — any NANP format; (2) +1 prefix (with +); (3) 1-NXX-NXX-XXXX dash/dot (without +); (4) (NXX) parenthesized area code; (5) NXX-NXX-XXXX or NXX.NXX.XXXX dash/dot bare. Bare space-separated 3-3-4 (e.g. NHS numbers) is NOT matched without context.

effect.message: Canadian phone number tokenized for de-identification
